title: useListState
description: Manages an array state with utility functions like add, remove, reorder, and update.
summary: State manager hook for dynamic lists with utility helpers.

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"use-list-state",code:`"use client";\r
import { useState } from "react";\r
\r
export interface UseListStateHandlers<T> {\r
  setState: React.Dispatch<React.SetStateAction<T[]>>;\r
  append: (...items: T[]) => void;\r
  prepend: (...items: T[]) => void;\r
  insert: (index: number, ...items: T[]) => void;\r
  pop: () => void;\r
  shift: () => void;\r
  apply: (fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => void;\r
  applyWhere: (condition: (item: T, index: number) => boolean, fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => void;\r
  remove: (...indices: number[]) => void;\r
  reorder: ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) => void;\r
  swap: ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) => void;\r
  setItem: (index: number, item: T) => void;\r
  setItemProp: <K extends keyof T, U extends T[K]>(index: number, prop: K, value: U) => void;\r
  filter: (fn: (item: T, i: number) => boolean) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export type UseListState<T> = [T[], UseListStateHandlers<T>];\r
\r
export function useListState<T>(initialValue: T[] = []): UseListState<T> {\r
  const [state, setState] = useState(initialValue);\r
\r
  const append = (...items: T[]) => setState(current => [...current, ...items]);\r
  const prepend = (...items: T[]) => setState(current => [...items, ...current]);\r
\r
  const insert = (index: number, ...items: T[]) => setState(current => [...current.slice(0, index), ...items, ...current.slice(index)]);\r
\r
  const apply = (fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => setState(current => current.map((item, index) => fn(item, index)));\r
\r
  const remove = (...indices: number[]) => setState(current => current.filter((_, index) => !indices.includes(index)));\r
\r
  const pop = () =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned.pop();\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const shift = () =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned.shift();\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const reorder = ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      const item = current[from];\r
\r
      cloned.splice(from, 1);\r
      cloned.splice(to, 0, item);\r
\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const swap = ({ from, to }: { from: number; to: number }) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      const fromItem = cloned[from];\r
      const toItem = cloned[to];\r
\r
      cloned.splice(to, 1, fromItem);\r
      cloned.splice(from, 1, toItem);\r
\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const setItem = (index: number, item: T) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned[index] = item;\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const setItemProp = <K extends keyof T, U extends T[K]>(index: number, prop: K, value: U) =>\r
    setState(current => {\r
      const cloned = [...current];\r
      cloned[index] = { ...cloned[index], [prop]: value };\r
      return cloned;\r
    });\r
\r
  const applyWhere = (condition: (item: T, index: number) => boolean, fn: (item: T, index?: number) => T) => setState(current => current.map((item, index) => (condition(item, index) ? fn(item, index) : item)));\r
\r
  const filter = (fn: (item: T, i: number) => boolean) => {\r
    setState(current => current.filter(fn));\r
  };\r
\r
  return [\r
    state,\r
    {\r
      setState,\r
      append,\r
      prepend,\r
      insert,\r
      pop,\r
      shift,\r
      apply,\r
      applyWhere,\r
      remove,\r
      reorder,\r
      swap,\r
      setItem,\r
      setItemProp,\r
      filter\r
    }\r
  ];\r
}`,ext:".ts",repo:"web/hooks/use-list-state.ts"})]})}function m(n={}){let{wrapper:e}=n.components||{};return e?(0,r.jsx)(e,{...n,children:(0,r.jsx)(l,{...n})}):l(n)}function w(n,e){throw new Error("Expected "+(e?"component":"object")+" `"+n+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}return S(k);})();
